scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n db,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && npm --prefix backend run format
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix frontend run format:check && npm --prefix backend run format:check
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
